# Qunova Computing — quantum computing for drug & materials design

**Source:** qunovacomputing.com · 2026-07-08 (retrieved)
**Author:** Qunova Computing (큐노바컴퓨팅)

## TL;DR

Qunova Computing, self-described as **Korea's first quantum-computing-solution venture**, applies quantum computing to drug and materials design via quantum modeling and optimization.

## Key claims

- Positions as "국내 1호 양자 컴퓨터 솔루션 벤쳐 기업" — Korea's first quantum-computer-solution venture company.
- Focus: **quantum computing for drug and materials design**; quantum modeling + optimization solutions (per site metadata).

## Evidence / examples

- Only the static landing-page metadata (`og:title`, `meta description`) was extractable — the body is a client-rendered SPA that fetch tooling cannot read.
- No product names, benchmarks, team, or publications captured.
